why_parked: GOLD itself is frozen at 2024-06-30 (~2 years stale) while the rest of the platform is current (2026). This fact is decommissioned upstream - there is no current gold to reach parity against. Per directive: frozen gold => park, do not chase parity. Migration row count already matches gold exactly.
dialect_notes: Proc is incremental (DELETE by ModificationDateID + WHERE on StatusModificationTime). If re-sourced, only fix needed is DATEDIFF(0, StatusModificationTime) -> date_format(StatusModificationTime,'yyyyMMdd'). Source: dwh_daily_process.daily_snapshot.etoro_BackOffice_GetProcessedWithdrawPCIVersion.
